Label.class: text-xs text-indigo-300 font-bold bg-indigo-900/60 border border-indigo-500/20 rounded-full px-4 py-1 self-center mt-2

StackLayout.class: bg-indigo-900/50 border border-indigo-500/20 rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-2xl

Label.class: text-center text-2xl font-black text-white bg-indigo-950/80 border border-indigo-700/40 rounded-2xl py-4

Button.class: bg-rose-600 active:bg-rose-700 text-white font-extrabold text-lg rounded-2xl py-4 shadow-lg shadow-rose-500/20
